title: Full cargo check + fvm flutter analyze validation
description:
Validate all created artifacts. Run cargo check --workspace, flutter analyze on android/ dir.

Algorithm:
1. cargo check --workspace (must be clean)
2. fvm flutter --project-root android analyze (Dart static analysis)
3. fvm flutter --project-root android pub get

Acceptance: Both commands exit 0 with no errors.
acceptance_criteria: cargo check --workspace exits 0; flutter analyze exits 0
close_reason: cargo check --workspace clean; fvm flutter analyze clean
